_meta.project: Beacon — Synchrony Acquisition Agent (agentic credit acquisition)
_meta.premise: Synchrony exposes its credit-acquisition capability to the AI agent ecosystem: external shopping agent -> A2A -> SYF Acquisition Agent -> MCP tools -> SYF acquisition/credit APIs.
_meta.note: ALL DATA FICTIONAL. No real customers, no real credit decisioning, no real PII or card numbers. Mock data + mock reasoning.
_meta.tagline: From conversation to confidence — open the line, finance the buy, inside the agent.

shopper.stated_intent: I want this fridge but I'd rather finance it over time. I don't have a card with you yet.

owns: Suitability — is a new credit line the right path for this shopper/cart?
Soft-pull-before-hard-pull sequencing (no hard inquiry without consent)
Identity / KYC sequencing before any decision
Fair-lending-safe framing of the offer and any decline
When NOT to offer (non-partner merchant, or no suitable program)
agent_role.why_agent_not_just_mcp: An external model cannot be trusted to make or frame a regulated credit decision. The decision and its compliance narrative must run on Synchrony's model. MCP exposes the typed tools; the Synchrony Acquisition Agent is the governed brain that calls them in the right order.

applicable.name: Synchrony Home Card
applicable.match_reason: Merchant is a Synchrony Home partner; cart $1,399 >= $499 promo floor; new-account path available.

applicable.name: CareCredit
applicable.match_reason: Health/wellness vertical — not applicable to an appliance purchase.

acquisition_funnel.detail: Matched Synchrony Home Card (0%/18mo). CareCredit excluded (wrong vertical).
Soft inquiry only -> pre-qualified up to $2,000. No hard pull yet.
HITL: shopper must consent before any application / hard pull.
Identity verified via mobile link (Prove InstantLink pattern). KYC passed.
Application submitted -> APPROVED. Credit line $2,000 assigned (new Synchrony account).
Tokenized authorization for $1,399 against the new line. Purchase completes in-conversation.

selected_offer.plain_language: Pre-qualified up to $2,000 (soft check only). On this $1,399 fridge: about $78/mo for 18 months, 0% if paid in term. Applying opens a new Synchrony Home account.

consent_gate.prompt: Open a Synchrony Home account and finance this — $78/mo for 18 months, 0% if paid in term? (A full application & credit check happens only after you say yes.)

tokenized_auth.checkout_result: Purchase completed in-conversation on the new Synchrony Home account.

audit_log.detail: Shopping agent -> Acquisition Agent, scope: soft_prequal_then_apply_on_consent
Soft inquiry only — no hard pull
Shopper consented to apply + credit check
Purchase authorized on new Synchrony Home account

confidence_checks.label: Soft pull before any application (no hard inquiry without consent)
Explicit consent before applying / credit check
Decision made on Synchrony's model, not the external agent

contrast_case.trigger: Shopper asks about the cheaper BargainBox fridge.
contrast_case.agent_message: No Synchrony program applies at this merchant — I won't start an application or surface an offer here.
contrast_case.why_it_matters: discover_offers returns nothing applicable -> the agent declines. Judgment, not always-yes.

chat_script.text: I want this fridge but I'd rather finance it over time. I don't have a card with you yet.
The CoolKeep at HomeWorks is $1,399. Let me check Synchrony financing options for you…
-> A2A handoff to Synchrony Acquisition Agent
You're pre-qualified up to $2,000 (soft check only). Best fit: Synchrony Home Card, 0% for 18 months, about $78/mo. Applying opens a new account.
Approved — $2,000 line opened, $1,399 financed at 0% for 18 months. Purchase complete; schedule emailed.
